description: Retrieve details of a specific Hotspot voucher.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Voucher note, may contain duplicate values across multiple vouchers

fields.name: code
fields.description: Secret code to active the voucher using the Hotspot portal

fields.name: authorizedGuestLimit
fields.description: (Optional) limit for how many different guests can use the same voucher to authorize network access

fields.name: authorizedGuestCount
fields.description: For how many guests the voucher has been used to authorize network access

fields.name: activatedAt
fields.description: (Optional) timestamp when the voucher has been activated (authorization time of the first guest)

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.description: (Optional) timestamp when the voucher will become expired. All guests using the voucher will be unauthorized from network access

fields.name: expired
fields.description: Whether the voucher has been expired and can no longer be used to authorize network access

fields.name: timeLimitMinutes
fields.description: How long (in minutes) the voucher will provide access to the network since authorization of the first guest. Subsequently connected guests, if allowed, will share the same expiration time.

fields.name: rxRateLimitKbps
fields.description: (Optional) download rate limit in kilobits per second

fields.name: txRateLimitKbps
fields.description: (Optional) upload rate limit in kilobits per second

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/hotspot/vouchers/{voucherId}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Get Voucher Details
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/hotspot/vouchers/{voucherId}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/hotspot/vouchers/{voucherId}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Get Voucher Details
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/hotspot/vouchers/{voucherId}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
